stories.headline: Middle East Peace Summit Yields Landmark Ceasefire Agreement
stories.summary: Leaders from Israel and Palestine signed a landmark ceasefire and framework for future talks, offering hope for regional stability.

stories.headline: UN Member States Adopt First Global AI Governance Framework
stories.summary: Nations approved the first international framework for AI ethics and safety, aiming to guide responsible development and deployment worldwide.

stories.headline: Asian Markets Rally on Strong Q2 Economic Growth Reports
stories.summary: Major Asian economies reported robust growth, boosting global investor confidence and signaling a strong recovery trajectory.

stories.headline: Fusion Reactor Achieves Sustained Net Energy Gain Milestone
stories.summary: Researchers announced a breakthrough in fusion energy, maintaining net energy gain for over an hour, a critical step towards clean power.

stories.headline: Severe Drought Escalates Humanitarian Crisis in Horn of Africa
stories.summary: UN agencies warn of escalating needs as persistent drought conditions intensify food insecurity for millions across the region.
